Bootstrap Profile

Create a profile once, then the app stores your `X-Actor-Id` locally.

Plan Tasks

Build repeatable templates ranked by weight.

Execute Today

Close the same queue in the same canonical order.

Ritual Close

Finalize the day without recalculating balance.

Profile Photo

Upload a local image and switch your avatar.

Balance Trail

Every execution appends a ledger row. The chart shows momentum over time.
